## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the [Arch Packaging Standards](https://wiki.archlinux.org/title/Arch_package_guidelines)
- [ ] I have tested the package locally with `makepkg -si`
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README.md, CHANGELOG.md) if needed
- [ ] I have used [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) for my commit messages
- [ ] The `.SRCINFO` file is up to date with `makepkg --printsrcinfo`

## Testing
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes work.

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)
